'''Carsan''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] officer and part of the [[Anti-Sith conspiracy]]. He was responsible for training [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Trachta]]'s [[clone stormtrooper]]s.

==Biography==
Just [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Carsan became involved in the [[Anti-Sith conspiracy]], a plot devised by the power-hungry [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Trachta]] to overthrow [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Carsan oversaw the creation and training of a special unit of [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] loyal exclusively to the conspiracy. Although these troops were essentially drones, Carsan was proud of his work and even treated them as though they were his children, a fact that earned him the scorn of Trachta.

To ascertain whether the clones would carry out any order made by the leaders of the coup, Trachta accused Carsan of sedition, and he was killed by the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] he had just presented to the Grand Moff.
